title: Signal
description: A Signal is a named domain event published after an Operation executes. Signals cross domain boundaries and carry a typed payload contract that subscribers depend on.

operation.description: The Operation whose successful execution publishes this signal, expressed as Resource.Action.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this signal represents.

payload.description: Typed fields carried by this signal — the contract that subscribers depend on.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of this payload field.

examples.name: lending.Loan.Disbursed
examples.description: Emitted when a loan is successfully disbursed to the borrower.
